title: Where is Google Wave?
body: ![](https://www.google.com/accounts/wave/wave-logo.gif "Google Wave")Yes, I already know what Wave is from Google, well, I don't know because despite having been after an account for a long time I haven't gotten it... And I didn't want to give an opinion before having it but seeing that the majority of people give their opinion and very positively, despite not having access either, I wanted to simply comment that this restriction seems to me more like a **Marketing operation** to get people talking of Wave than anything else. Because, for now, from what I've seen and read, I still don't fully understand what it's about... I don't know... maybe it's hard for me... but I don't know what it is... if it's intended to be a simple aggregator for your social networks, emails, etc. or does it go further... **What do you think?** By the way, if anyone has a free account... ;-)   diluvi@gmail.com, thank you
